programme.desc: Big Gay Al returns to South Park as the new scout leader. When he is fired for being gay, the boys rally to his defence with the help of the new 'handi-capable' kid, Jimmy.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 8, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Cash for Gold
programme.desc: Cartman launches his own gem shopping channel.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Super Fun Time
programme.desc: While the kids are on an educational field trip to a living museum, Cartman makes Butters sneak away from the class to go to the amusement center located next door.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: At Work and at Home
programme.desc: Pressure cleaning 101; DIY with Stone-coat countertops; project management software for the new millennium; and restoring your home after disaster strikes.

programme.title: The Closer: Home Improvement
programme.desc: A home construction site becomes a crime scene when a body turns up underneath a retainer wall. Brenda considers taking on a high-priced lawyer but the retainer fee could require cutting back on several luxuries.

programme.title: The Closer: Family Affair
programme.desc: The squad helps out a fellow law enforcement officer by investigating the mysterious death of her daughter. Captain Raydor continues her audit of Brenda and Major Crimes, focusing his efforts on Detective Sanchez.

programme.title: The Closer: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Brenda receives a tip about a murder-for-hire involving a major drug cartel and solicits Captain Raydor's help. Meanwhile, Brenda's attorney starts deposing the squad about the case at the centre of the civil lawsuit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Adams/ Hess
programme.desc: An animal loving family who no fashion sense swaps places with an animal hating family with huge style.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Hailer-Wren/ Spencer
programme.desc: A macho family of football players who expect their trophy wife/mom to serve their every need swap lives with a happy hippie family whose feminist mom believes in breaking accepted gender roles.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Herrington/ Trevino
programme.desc: A clean-cut family who perform a wholesome variety show swap lives with a rule-free family of low-riders who let their girls wear and say anything they want.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder
programme.desc: A man is found dead on his living room floor, three decades later his case remains open. A detective is determined to pin the crime on the man's roommate.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Disappearing
programme.desc: A mother kills herself, leaving behind no sign of her son. Also, an ex-boyfriend allegedly kills four members of his ex-girlfriend's family.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: A Problem Like Maria
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Cornelia Marie's deck becomes a gauntlet for Josh and Casey's greenest greenhorn as the super snow-moon storm peaks. Monte scrambles to stay afloat amid ice fog, and Harley loses an engine.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning
programme.desc: As the fleet mounts a final Winter season push, sad news rattles the Cornelia Marie wheelhouse. Lady Alaska greenhorn, Gabby, overcomes a painful injury to support her crew. Wild Bill's deckhands must devise a bush fix or face hauling pots by hand.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Gabe vs. the Wild
programme.desc: Gabe loses a prized possession after a confrontation with an aggressive ostrich. Later, the family builds a fence around the property after the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The Wolfpack has risked everything to transform the raw wilderness into a working ranch. As they expand faster than they expected, the family is forced to evolve in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning
programme.desc: As the fleet mounts a final Winter season push, sad news rattles the Cornelia Marie wheelhouse. Lady Alaska greenhorn, Gabby, overcomes a painful injury to support her crew. Wild Bill's deckhands must devise a bush fix or face hauling pots by hand.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Gabe vs. the Wild
programme.desc: Gabe loses a prized possession after a confrontation with an aggressive ostrich. Later, the family builds a fence around the property after the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beyond the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack gathers and gets candid about untold secrets and burning questions that fans have wondered for years. From epic adventure to major struggles, they expose their world like never before.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Atlantis
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange island in the Mediterranean might offer new clues in the hunt for Atlantis. Using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts reveal the apocalyptic event that destroyed this long-lost civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech helps experts explore The Empire State Building, one of the wonders of the modern world, like never before, revealing the secrets of its construction and the mysteries hidden deep in its foundation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Finding Sparta's 300
programme.desc: New discoveries might lead investigators to the legendary group of 300 Spartan warriors who died fighting off one million invading Persians, and using cutting-edge tech, experts reconstruct the lost battlefield to uncover the secrets of their last stand.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Twin Towers: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence recovered from the site of the World Trade Center's Twin Towers reveals answers to the greatest mysteries of these modern marvels, and using cutting-edge science and technology, experts investigate the science behind why they collapsed.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Home for the Holidays?
programme.desc: The holidays are here, and the family prays for a Christmas miracle -- that Awesome Dawsyn can finally leave the hospital and come home. When the Derricos' wish comes true, however, they face a challenge far greater than they're ready for.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: Meet Gracie Duggar
programme.desc: John David goes from 'bachelor till the rapture' to dad! He prepares for the arrival of his first child by making a special video for Abbie. Abbie goes into labor, but it's deemed a false alarm. After laboring overnight, she and John meet their daughter.

programme.title: Counting On: From Snow to Sand
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy take advantage of all California has to offer when they take friends on a snow to sand adventure. Back in Arkansas, the guys throw John a Dad-chelor party to welcome him to fatherhood. Then, Joy and Austin share exciting news.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Dawsyn's settled at home, but it's just a matter of time before the final surgery, and tensions are high. Splitting responsibilities has Karen questioning whether she and Dawsyn are getting the support they need. Meanwhile, GG drops a bomb about Darian.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: OutValentined
programme.desc: Adam faces the challenge of pleasing his wife and all six of his daughters for Valentine's Day. Then, Adam and Danielle are stunned by what they learn at Hazel's doctor appointment.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: Meet Gracie Duggar
programme.desc: John David goes from 'bachelor till the rapture' to dad! He prepares for the arrival of his first child by making a special video for Abbie. Abbie goes into labor, but it's deemed a false alarm. After laboring overnight, she and John meet their daughter.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Divide and Conquer

programme.title: OutDaughtered: OutValentined
programme.desc: Adam faces the challenge of pleasing his wife and all six of his daughters for Valentine's Day. Then, Adam and Danielle are stunned by what they learn at Hazel's doctor appointment.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Multiples Multiplied!
programme.desc: Karen and Deon Derrico have a knack for conceiving multiples -- even quintuplets, completely naturally. The stakes are running extra high, however, with their most-recent set of triplets, who seem to be ready for the world well before their due date.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Multiple Aftershocks
programme.desc: Deon manages the household of 11 children while Karen goes on bed rest in the hospital. When an earthquake shakes up Las Vegas, however, the Derricos' plans to carry the triplets to 32 weeks goes completely awry.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Like Mother, Unlike Daughter
programme.desc: Valerie's budget is unlimited thanks to Dad, but Mom disagrees with her sexy dress choices. Bride Napiera wants a ball gown, but both her mother and former TV mom' think form fitting is best.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Rainbow Unicorn Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colourful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding, but her mother does not approve. Bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day. Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Counting On: Count Your Blessings
programme.desc: John and Abbie 'Finnish' their winter honeymoon in Finland. Jinger flies to Arkansas after Grandma Duggar's health declines. Meanwhile, Lauren opens up about her struggles with grief and depression.

programme.title: Counting On: Kendra's Got a Secret
programme.desc: Kendra surprises Joe when she finds out she's expecting baby number two! Jessa recruits her brothers to build a deck for her house before the new baby's arrival. While Jessa and Ben are at the doctor with Henry, the guys also babysit Spurgeon.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chrystie and Treasure
programme.desc: Chrystie, a newcomer to couponing, has a stockpile that is slowly taking over every spare space in her small home. Meanwhile, Treasure started couponing to save the family business, but now has a stockpile worth over $35,000.

programme.title: Killer Kids: The Lost Boy/ Family Heirloom

programme.title: Killer Kids: No Apparent Motive
programme.desc: After finding a young woman strangled to death in Bellevue, Washington, they return to her home where they find her family has been brutally murdered as well. Plus, after two young boys go missing, their family enters a nightmare.

programme.title: Killer Kids: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: A bullying victim is finally pushed to his breaking point in Noble, Illinois. Plus, one of the youngest serial killers in US history stalked the streets of Warwick, Rhode Island.

programme.title: Killer Kids: The Breaking Point
programme.desc: It's the 4th of July 2004 and on a ranch near Roswell, New Mexico, tragedy strikes. A family is found murdered, but when the 14-year-old killer is brought to justice, he finds surprising support from his community.

programme.title: Killer Kids: Raging Hormones
programme.desc: A young boy finds refuge in online chat rooms, much like many other teens. He forms a bond with another that takes him down a dark path and on Halloween night in 1979 his activities leave a town reeling.

programme.title: Killer Kids: Mommie Dearest/ Forbidden Love
programme.desc: A calculating wife in Lynton, Indiana manipulates her daughter in a horrifying plot to murder her husband. The entire town becomes a suspect as police try to uncover who did the crime. Plus two Goth teens begin a secret love affair filled with murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Wish
programme.desc: A 46-year-old man is found dead on the street after his birthday celebration. The detectives make a public plea for leads and then go to New York to hunt down the potential killer.

programme.title: The First 48: The Good Son/ Jacked Up
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when a 16-year-old boy is murdered at his family's roadside taco stand.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cake Loss

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chelsea Handler
programme.desc: Chelsea Handler battles the wings of death while discussing skiing, dogs, 50 Cent, HR blunders and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Chopped: Ultimate Redemption
programme.desc: Four chefs who didn't make it in high-stakes tournaments return in search of redemption. The competitors face goat chop appetizers in the first round. A breakfast cereal is the crunchy curveball in the entree basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Worst Cooks Challenge
programme.desc: Former winners and runners arrive with something to prove. The first round, competitor’s do a nice job with their frog leg appetizers, but the second round has the remaining chefs struggling to cook steak correctly.

programme.title: Chopped: Brady Bunch Bash
programme.desc: Three stars from the legendary TV show The Brady Bunch are perched at the Chopping Block as guest judges, and they're eager to enjoy a meal prepared by some of their biggest fans.

programme.title: Chopped: B.L.D.: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner!
programme.desc: The chefs set out to make a whole day's worth of amazing food when the cooking rounds are changed to breakfast, lunch and dinner. The judges hope the chefs who make it to the final round will be able to make lamb dinners to remember.

programme.title: Chopped: Pass the Popcorn Shoots
programme.desc: The competing chefs attack an appetizer basket that includes a classic Italian sauce and a simple sandwich. A popcorn product not available at movie theaters plays a starring role in round two.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Sugary Showpieces
programme.desc: Four chefs stretch their imaginations as they craft towering architectural desserts. They face awfully challenging duck offal in the round one basket and play with chocolate, strawberry and peanut flavors in round two.

programme.title: Chopped: Basket Buzz
programme.desc: The first basket includes a giant circle of dough with a long history and veggies that look like tiny watermelons, but taste like something else. Chewy candy and sweet cheese must make their way to the chefs' entree plates.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farmers' Breakfast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is showing her thanks to all the hardworking farmers with a hearty breakfast spread. She makes a crowd-pleasing Cheesy Kale Breakfast Casserole and crispy Corned Beef Hash Waffles.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dad's Midwest Concert
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's dad is in town to play a clarinet concert, and she's making an Asian-inspired lunch of succulent sugar-coated pork buns and crunchy drunken cucumber noodles to fill him up beforehand.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hawaii Farm'O
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a tiki party game night with all her favourite Hawaiian-inspired foods. She prepares delicious Hurricane Popcorn Balls, Sweet and Salty Pork Musubi, a mouth-watering Macaroni Salad and creamy Macadamia Nut Pops for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything Wildcard
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers wildcard questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares an over-the-top good seared rib eye Banh Mi Vietnamese sandwich and an awesome chicken quinoa bowl with roasted corn salsa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lighter 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Ree cooks against the clock to make four of her favorite recipes over into lighter, healthier 16-minute meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line up of make-ahead portable canapes on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meatless Marvels
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has stocked her kitchen with all the ingredients to make some of her favorite meatless meals, and she's whipping up broccoli cheese baked potatoes, Greek grilled eggplant steaks and roasted vegetable panzanella.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Herbalicious
programme.desc: Ree's whipping up delicious food with her homegrown herbs. There's lemon-rosemary scones, French onion soup with fresh thyme, a gorgeous panzanella salad packed with basil and a minty raita with salted naan wedges.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 13
programme.desc: Ree cooks up ranch-style Italian with the help of her kid crew. First up is a family favourite: chicken Florentine mac and cheese. Then, a squash replaces spaghetti in a healthy spin on classic Bolognese and a cast iron pizza Bianca in a skillet.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: If at First You Don't Succeed, Fry, Fry Again

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Returns To GGG!
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives buddies roll up to Guy's turf for a challenge of a lifetime. The chefs must first knock down crazy food pins to pick the ingredients to put between two buns!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five-Star Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri transforms Flavortown into a high-end restaurant and invites four chefs for three rounds of five-star cooking. First, he challenges them to elevate the ingredients in a frozen TV dinner, then to prepare signature dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cart Wars
programme.desc: The chefs are given the task of making tacos without tortillas, taco seasoning and ground beef. Then, the chefs are challenged to make a sandwich using only frozen food. Finally, the chefs must make a seafood dish with five ingredients or less.

programme.title: Shark of Darkness: Wrath of Submarine

programme.title: Surviving Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Infamous zoo operator Joe Exotic gave one of his last interviews to Animal Planet before his arrest. In this ultimately heartwarming story of the rescue of four big cats from his zoo, we hear from ex-employees, rescue organizations and Joe Exotic himself.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Cat vs. Robot
programme.desc: Dr. Blue quarantines a dog who may be suffering with the flu, while Dr. Ross treats a wobbly boxer whose limbs never fully formed. Dr. Lavigne thinks a robot vacuum is to blame for a stressed-out cat and performs emergency surgery to save a puppy's life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Operation Dalmatian
programme.desc: Dr. Blue performs a difficult surgery on a Dalmatian being weighed down by a grapefruit-sized tumor on his head. Dr. Ross brings his family together to get a service dog for his brother Tedric, who has been suffering from seizures his whole life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Pig Whisperers
programme.desc: Dr. Blue takes on an urgent case after a pit bull suffers a raccoon attack. Dr. Ross takes on an aggressive ferret, and the vets test out their pig whispering skills at an animal rescue. The doctors have a surprise announcement for their wives.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hog House Call
programme.desc: Bubby Cook, a beloved Basset Hound, has a condition that could complicate surgery for Dr. Ross. Dr. Blue has a hog house call, and Dr. Lavigne has concerns over his vet tech assisting with an operation on her own dog. A blackout creates chaos at Cy-Fair.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Falcon Festival
programme.desc: The docs head to the Renaissance Faire to tend to the birds of prey in need of the West Nile vaccine. Piper the peppy dachshund is not herself and Dr. Lavigne must perform surgery. Meanwhile, Dr. Ross treats Tesla the tortoise for a fractured beak.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Saving Captain Hook
programme.desc: Police rescue a turtle caught on fishing line and it's up to Dr. Ross to unhook him. Dr. Blue must wait for test results after performing dental surgery on a loveable dachshund, while Dr. Lavigne gives a stray cat first class treatment.

programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights
programme.desc: Booker joins ballet club to win over Danni, but when Logan, the coolest kid in school, makes fun of it, Booker quits.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Adolessons
programme.desc: Booker seeks guidance from Devon as he begins adolescence. Raven and Tess help Nia deal with her first failing grade in school. Chelsea starts online dating with Levi's support.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lake Rancid
programme.desc: When a magazine contacts Destiny to do a story on her community service, Matteo, Gwen, and Finn help her clean only one area of the shore, hiding the rest of the trash.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Close Shave
programme.desc: When Booker shirks his responsibilities, helping Mr. Arthur at the local barbershop to attend a concert promoted by Chris Spring-Lake, Mr. Arthur recruits Raven to do her son's work.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Hoop Streams
programme.desc: When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess rallies everyone to help her host a live telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed
programme.desc: When Booker becomes responsible for choosing who will represent the class at the district poetry slam, Nia thinks she has a guaranteed spot on the team. Meanwhile, Raven and Chelsea start a DIY renovation on their new business space.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Boy Meets Dad
programme.desc: Max is excited to be honored with the Heart of Portland award for his philanthropic work. However things go awry when Max's dad, who he's not on the best terms with, comes to visit.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Slurping With The Enemy
programme.desc: Max is worried when a new smoothie shop creates competition for his business, and discovers Sydney and her friends can't resist their popular flamingo drink. In the '90s, Leo's dad is worried the new laser tag place will threaten business for his arcade.

programme.title: Jessie: Evil Times Two

programme.title: Jessie: Gotcha Day

programme.title: Bunk'd: Boo Boos and Birthdays
programme.desc: Emma and Zuri butt heads when trying to plan a surprise birthday party for Tiffany. Meanwhile, in order to get out of a volleyball tournament, Ravi and Jorge fake injuries.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Disorder in the Court
programme.desc: Levi's Dad, Garrett, returns from prison, but Raven, Chelsea and the kids are dismayed to discover that he has stolen Chelsea's invention.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Girls Just Want to Have Phones
programme.desc: Nia and Tess challenge Raven and Chelsea to see who can go without technology the longest. Meanwhile, Booker tries to impress a new girl in the building.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Frame-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Grandma-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Mysteries and Meddling Kids

programme.desc: When Juleka's picture day 'curse' is made worse by being excluded from the class picture, Juleka is akumatized and turns into Reflekta.

programme.desc: Vincent wants nothing more than to pose for a picture with his favourite pop singer, Jagged Stones, but when the star rejects him, Vincent gets akumatized into Pixelator, who is determined to capture his idol's image for good.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Angels and Daemons
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of tech entrepreneur turned capitalist who secretly developed a daemon, a background computer program that allows for undetectable data collection.

programme.title: Dateline: The Face of Evil
programme.desc: The fire department responds to a call of an apartment fire. Inside they find the body of 21-year-old Carolyn Casey. The investigation into what happened to this bright, young woman leads investigators down a dark path to a serial killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Imel
programme.desc: A brutal slaying and car fire leads police to a family conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Holly McFeeture
programme.desc: An Ohio man's murder is suspect to suicide though suspecting the fiancée.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Spiritual Warriors
programme.desc: After three obedient followers die during an intense sweat lodge ceremony put on by a prominent self-help guru, police must determine if their deaths were accidental, or did the guru push the participants too far.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Angel's Landing
programme.desc: To his followers, he's an angel who died and came back to life, but when seemingly accidental deaths keep occurring around him, one investigator digs deeper. Are these strange coincidences or is something more disturbing going on at Angel's Landing?

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Online Alien Reptiles
programme.desc: It was a 911 call for a suicide. However, when cops interview the victim's girlfriend, she claims there's more behind his death. Police must determine if an online cult that believes in aliens and reptiles disguised as humans is actually at fault.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: A family is desperate to find their daughter, Gail, who ran off with a strange cult. Years later, police are called to a posh mansion near San Diego and are shocked to find 39 bodies in a mass suicide. Was Gail one of the deceased or did she escape?

programme.title: Deadly Cults: The Camp

programme.title: Mega Machines: Goliath of the Outback

programme.title: Mega Machines: Monster Train

programme.title: Mega Machines: World's Strongest Plane

programme.title: Mega Machines: Speed Demon Super Ship
programme.desc: Special access inside one of the world's fastest catamarans reveals the secrets of a high-speed, hi-tech monster ferry that uses the power of 50 Formula One cars to conquer some of the roughest seas on earth.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Monster Truck
programme.desc: A hi-tech monster truck is helping make far-off interstellar discoveries possible as it carries a multimillion-dollar telescope across one of the world's harshest landscapes. Special access reveals the cutting-edge engineering responsible for this marvel.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: Homicide City: Germantown Tragedy

programme.title: Homicide City: A Manager's Murder
programme.desc: Five months before restaurant manager John Thurberg is to be married, his fiance is devastated to learn of his murder at work. The motive is not initially clear, but when police question employees, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.desc: A blood-stained bicycle hidden in an Ohio cornfield sets the stage for an unspeakable crime. While police race to find missing college student Sierah Joughin, a vicious predator lurks somewhere in the rural, Midwestern countryside.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The War Next Door
programme.desc: A family loves everything about their new home except the mockingbirds that perch and squawk in the backyard lemon tree. Their efforts to scare them off start a feud with their neighbors that spins out of control until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote

programme.title: Betrayed: One Way Ticket Out
programme.desc: When lifelong Long Islander Donna Bocklet announces she's leaving for Florida, it sends shock waves through her close circle of friends and family that ends in her brutal murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Two's Company, Three is Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singleton's life appears picture perfect. Little does everyone know Linda is engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair comes to light, her 'perfect' life comes to an untimely end.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Vows, Lies, and Whispers
programme.desc: Free-spirited Hope follows her heart to Oklahoma to marry Jerry Meek but it's not long before kids come along and the honeymoon is over. On the night of February 21, 2002, a series of mysterious events shatter the family and remain unresolved for years.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Three Pops and a Pause
programme.desc: Ashlee and Emmett Corrigan seem to have it all; true love, five beautiful children, and a growing business. But in March 2011, an explosive encounter blows their lives apart in an instant, revealing their marriage is not what it seemed.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: End of Days
programme.desc: The complex relationship between Christian and Jewish Zionists.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' Pools
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Showroom Transformation
programme.desc: The builders transform a nearby office space into a showroom for their business. They use vertical barnwood, horizontal barnwood and a timber frame facade, then finish the room off with barn doors and reclaimed roofing tin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Leftovers Get Upcycled
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders are using their leftovers to build a 'Parts and Pieces Pavilion' to sell their scraps as upcycled products.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rocky Mountain Cabin
programme.desc: The team brings an Appalachian-style cabin all the way to western Colorado.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Dessert
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Florida
programme.desc: Strongman Eddie Hall gets a lesson in pro-wrestling from his childhood idols and WWE legends, The Headbangers. Then, he tours the Florida Everglades with guide Jesse Kennon to meet some alligators before eating fried alligator tails and frog legs.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Houston
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the grim reaper in a crazy crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome Reaper Pepper, devours real southern comfort-food and pulls a full-sized plane down a runway.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Room/ The Mystery of the Magnificent Musicians
programme.desc: When Mira and her friends get stuck in a hidden room in the palace, it's up to her to find a way out. When some of the townspeople's musical instruments go missing before a big music jam, Mira must find out what happened.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Robot's Pet Cat/ Gekko, Master of the Deep
programme.desc: While trying to stop Romeo from turning people into pets, Catboy gets turned into a cat! Gekko is afraid to ask for help when he must fight Romeo's Roboctopus underwater.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Missing Space Rock / Flying Factory Out of Control
programme.desc: Newton thinks Owlette stole a precious asteroid – but she’s been framed by Romeo. Romeo needs the PJs' help bringing his Flying Factory under control, but they don't trust him.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members in Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Band Concert
programme.desc: The Sensational Six Polka Band is planning to provide the musical accompaniment for the baby elephants' dance performance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem
programme.desc: When the Clubhouse's Silly Switch gets stuck on silly, everything turns silly.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Just like the fairy tale, Minnie comes across trouble in the woods.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Chuggington: It's Not Easy Being Clean / Monkey Sitting
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon!/ Roaming Around Rome
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete against cheating Piston Pietro in Rome. The Happy Helpers cover for a sick friend by giving a tour of Rome to a travel critic.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Guru Goofy/ Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!
programme.desc: Goofy tries to teach Donald mindfulness in order to relax before the Roadster Games. When Clarabelle assists the Happy Helpers run a bed and breakfast, her eagerness creates more problems.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Floating Stone/The Light In the Storm
programme.desc: Mazu and Rocky must work together to save Tiny and Bill from Terminonator. Bill and Marsh are separated from their friends in a storm and must face their fears to get home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofy's Hot Dog Harvest/ Puppy Birthday to You
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Wrecked Recital / The Case of the Vanishing Vessels
programme.desc: When Prince Neel's sitar goes missing, Mira must track it down before great aunt Rupa finds out. Then, Mira goes on a mysterious underground adventure to find toy boats for a race.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Take Your Pet to the Vet/ Master and Commander
programme.desc: Doc brings home her class hamster to care for over the weekend and must take her to the veterinarian after she comes down with a cold. Then, Commander Crush gets injured after he ignores Doc's advice to be careful while leaning back in his chair.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall

programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.
