programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: L.A., at Last
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive in Hollywood, CA.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Don Juan and the Starlets
programme.desc: Lucy is forced to lend Ricky to five starlets for an evening of publicity pictures.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Gets Into Pictures
programme.desc: Lucy snares a big part in a motion picture, and vows to make her death scene the best.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Fashion Show
programme.desc: Lucy is eager to contribute to a fashion show featuring the wives of motion picture stars.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters
programme.desc: Dorothy surprises herself and her housemates by having a relationship with a married man.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: Movie: Yes, I Do
programme.desc: A busy chocolatier has left her helicopter mechanic at the altar three times and now she needs to prove to him that she really does want to marry him.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former 'Most Eligible Bachelor' how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Movie: Ms. Matched
programme.desc: A successful wedding planner is paired with a financial advisor at a wedding expo and soon realizes she is giving the exact opposite advice to their audience. When they are forced to spend time together, they find out they have a lot in common.

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A woman falls for a client's dog and the local vet.

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy
programme.desc: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: South Park: White People Renovating Houses
programme.desc: Randy comes to grips with what it means to be white in today's society.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway Bro Down
programme.desc: After Randy takes Sharon to see a hit musical, he becomes Broadway's biggest fan.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville
programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy. Stan and Kyle find another solution and save the townspeople's finances.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park: Sarcastaball
programme.desc: The people of South Park Elementary address the crisis in football concussions.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever

programme.title: Military Makeover: Marquez Family Episode 1
programme.desc: Meet our newest family, The Marquezes of Dacula, Georgia.

programme.title: The Closer: Star Turn
programme.desc: Major Crimes investigates the disappearance of a stage father just as his daughter's new single is about to hit the charts. The Baylor family officers to settle with Brenda in the suit against her but the deal may be too good to be true.

programme.title: The Closer: Fresh Pursuit
programme.desc: While dealing with the stress of not knowing whether or not a judge will drop the charges against her, Brenda and her squad investigate the shooting of a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: The Closer: Necessary Evil
programme.desc: When a high school principal is shot, Brenda and her detectives soon realize their case overlaps with an existing FBI investigation. The situation leaves Fritz and Brenda sparring over whose murder case it should be.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Derek's mother, Carolyn, makes a surprise visit to Seattle and meets Meredith for the first time while Mark tries to conceal his relationship with Lexie. Meanwhile, death row inmate William wishes to donate his organs to Bailey and Arizona's patient.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Stairway to Heaven
programme.desc: As time runs out for Bailey's young patient, Meredith fights to grant a death row inmate's wish to donate his organs to the boy.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Beat Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Derek has the engagement ring and searches for the perfect way to propose to Meredith. Lexie demands that Mark go public with their relationship. Bailey considers a new direction for her medical career.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: After leaving her husband Shane Miller, Sandy eventually returns home with their two daughters. Days later, a 911 call brings police to the home where they discover the murdered bodies of Sandy and the kids with Shane nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Torture House
programme.desc: Two brothers share a grotesque hobby of kidnapping and torturing prostitutes, until one of their victims escapes and leads police to their house of horrors.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Holier Than Josh
programme.desc: Josh chats about tales of good and evil with American Gods' Orlando Jones, Walking Dead's Sarah Wayne Callies and Doug Jones of Hellboy.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Beware The Buckshot
programme.desc: Halfway to the championship and a chance at the $25,000 prize, a new group of players comes up against an array of perilous new dodgeball projectiles. A pro wrestler brings the fury, a mad scientist shows off her ninja skills, and it's USA vs. The UK.

programme.title: Kaplan America: The Origin Story
programme.desc: Ken Kaplan is a motorcycle-flipping American patriot. This week Ken and his son race to get five bikes ready for auction and fight to track down and return three stolen bikes to their rightful owner.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Holier Than Josh
programme.desc: Josh chats about tales of good and evil with American Gods' Orlando Jones, Walking Dead's Sarah Wayne Callies and Doug Jones of Hellboy.

programme.title: Kaplan America: The Origin Story
programme.desc: Ken Kaplan is a motorcycle-flipping American patriot. This week Ken and his son race to get five bikes ready for auction and fight to track down and return three stolen bikes to their rightful owner.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: Tickle answers the call when Josh needs help salvaging an abandoned submarine still and his season. Mark and Digger take on a specialty bourbon made from Indian corn. Facing jail time, Van and Ewok gamble their freedom for another run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Run for the Hills
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt to rescue a former apprentice from a moonshine calamity. An unknown competitor invades Mike's turf, forcing him to change his shine strategy. Mark and Huck bank on backwoods survival skills to fuel their high-proof run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Say Yes to the Mess
programme.desc: Tickle announces his engagement and Tim discovers why his best friend can't quit the outlaw side. Unable to sell any shine, Mike attempts a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law. Josh bets that Sin City needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Murphy's Law for Outlaws
programme.desc: Tickle and Tim put fire to their first backwoods run in a decade. With 250 gallons of mash on the brink of expiring, Mark and Digger torpedo their own operation. A minor oversight for Josh triggers a domino effect that threatens his entire site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Georgia on My Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger head down to Georgia and uncover 'Elvis,' Popcorn Sutton's most prolific still. Mike plots payback after discovering a rival's liquor stealing his customers. Tim and Tickle are torn over what to do with their new backwoods shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Unexpected Offer
programme.desc: Mike and Jerry confront Daniel about how their rival's liquor is invading their territory. Tickle, Henry and Kenny scale up their CBD-infused moonshine operation. A new bootlegger makes Mark and Digger an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Marvelous Mrs. Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle gets a life sentence and Appalachia turns out for his first walk down the aisle. Mark and Digger risk delivering strong shine and sweet justice. Josh smashes obstacles that stood in his way all season. Mike gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy Lyn's Story

programme.title: The First 48: Bloody Valentine/ Storm Warning

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage

programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine's in for a 2-in-1 challenge when he's tasked with fixing the Zest Bistro, located inside the Lemon Tree Grocer in Downers Grove, Ill.

programme.title: Chopped: Bizarre Battle
programme.desc: The chefs are shocked to find out that, in this special episode, bizarre foods will be found in all the baskets. In the first round, a strange bird part and a stinky young fruit are two of the surprises in the baskets.

programme.title: Chopped: Weird Twist

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Tracing Bullets
programme.desc: It's a busy day for Wardens Gould and Scott when deer remains are found on private property and stray bullets are fired into a horse owner's home. Then, Warden Bailey questions a group of underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dive Team Mission
programme.desc: Officer Demler pulls over a swerving car and finds himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. In Kingston, a dive team is deployed to search for a man suspected of drowning.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed Whackers
programme.desc: Officer Arsenault teams up with police to stake-out a marijuana grow in the middle of the woods.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Just One More ...
programme.desc: The rule is clear: one hunter one deer. But some hunters are greedy and the wardens are there to stop them. Plus, a deputy joins his first night-hunting stakeout, LaFlamme searches for an arrow that can help solve a mystery and a family covers up a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The End Is Near
programme.desc: A Facebook post leads the wardens to a gang of poachers, which turns into a manhunt when the ringleader skips bail. The wardens capture a flock of nuisance wild turkeys and search all night for a rabbit hunter lost in the snowy woods.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Family Matters
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger mom Kirana is facing the loss of her sons, Topan and Jaya. They're now adults, and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. But keepers are unsure how Kirana and her remaining cub will react to the departure of the boys.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Romance

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Coolest Treehouse Ever Built

programme.desc: An attractive woman witnesses her ex-boyfriend’s shooting, but can’t remember what happened, raising questions about suicide, stalking and split personalities.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Face Of Evil
programme.desc: The fire department responds to an apartment fire. Inside they find the body of 21-year-old Carolyn Casey. The investigation into what happened to this bright, young woman leads investigators down a dark path to a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Consumed
programme.desc: In January of 2014, a loving mother was found dead in her burned home near Paducah, Kentucky. What first appeared to be a terrible accident, turned into a lurid tale of deception and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client
programme.desc: Beverly Carter, a beloved mother, wife and a successful real estate broker had a long list of clients. Then she vanished. Like all-too-many missing persons cases, police knew it was a race against time to find her, before it was too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Quiet One
programme.desc: A beautiful woman thought she'd found her prince charming but their story turned out to be anything but a fairy tale. He was downstairs with the kids while she was upstairs in the bath. Then it happened; was it an accident or murder.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Snapped: Joann Helfrich
programme.desc: A woman blames mistaken identity in her boyfriend’s death, though the evidence may be pointing to something more sinister.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna Findlay
programme.desc: A college instructor dials 911, but will the police find a murder scene or a suicide?

programme.title: Snapped: Lupita Acuna
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads investigators to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20-stab wounds. The Medical Examiner classifies her death as murder. But when the M.E. later changes the ruling to suicide, the decision forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish
programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Twin Tragedy
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters are involved in a horrific crash on the island of Maui. Miraculously, one sister survives after their car plunges over the side of a cliff. Was this a tragic accident or something more ominous?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A young woman is found with a fatal head wound and her hand on the shotgun. Her fiancé claims she killed herself but grieving family members insist the suicide scene was staged. The case goes cold until a new prosecutor takes a second look.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Crash
programme.desc: A car crash on a rural highway leaves one woman dead while her husband walks away unscathed. It appears to be a tragic accident. Still, one state trooper can't shake the feeling the crash is anything but routine.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: In the Fire
programme.desc: Firefighters discover the charred remains of a young wife and mother but the flames didn't kill her. She sustained a gunshot wound to the head and the evidence points to suicide. Loved ones argue it's a case of murder.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Guilt Or Innocence
programme.desc: When the body parts of two missing teens are found in a backyard cornfield, Ohio detectives uncover dark family secrets to track their suspect. The community fears there may never be justice when the man convicted of the crime is released from prison.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard

programme.title: Snapped: Shanda Crain
programme.desc: When a daughter discovers her parents’ dead bodies within weeks of two other family members’ murders, investigators wonder if the family is being targeted or if it could be an inside job.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
programme.desc: After his grandfather mysteriously dies, Jake finds clues to a place known as Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children. As he gets to know the residents, all of whom have special abilities, the Home is attacked by a group of powerful enemies.

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Purpose
programme.desc: A dog looks to discover his purpose through several owners and lifetimes. He spends each of his lives showing humans how to laugh and love, until in one of his lifetimes he ends up back with his original owner. He does his best to make his owner remember.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha
programme.desc: A young man injured and left for dead during the last ice age struggles to survive in a hostile world. After fighting off a pack of wolves, he nurses one of the injured animals back to health and forms a lasting bond with it that changes history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Building Giants: NFL Super Stadiums
programme.desc: In partnership with the NFL, we go behind the scenes to meet the fearless team of engineers constructing the two and a half billion dollars, SoFi Stadium, the new game- day home to the LA Chargers and LA Rams.

programme.title: Building Giants: Rise of the Mega Stadium
programme.desc: The most cutting edge venue in the world, Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium, hosts the greatest athletes in the world and engineer show how this state-of-the-art arena was designed and constructed.

programme.title: Building Giants: NFL Super Stadiums
programme.desc: In partnership with the NFL, we go behind the scenes to meet the fearless team of engineers constructing the two and a half billion dollars, SoFi Stadium, the new game- day home to the LA Chargers and LA Rams.

programme.title: Building Giants: Rise of the Mega Stadium
programme.desc: The most cutting edge venue in the world, Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium, hosts the greatest athletes in the world and engineer show how this state-of-the-art arena was designed and constructed.

programme.title: Building Giants: NFL Super Stadiums
programme.desc: In partnership with the NFL, we go behind the scenes to meet the fearless team of engineers constructing the two and a half billion dollars, SoFi Stadium, the new game- day home to the LA Chargers and LA Rams.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Megaquake
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Cold Blue Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Dirk Greineder is one of the most respected men in the upper class community of Wellesley, Massachusetts… that is, until a secret X-rated addiction spirals out of control and results in a gruesome murder no one saw coming.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will. Another man is visiting his girlfriend at work on Valentine's Day when a robber leaps onto the counter. Both men take heroic action, ensuring no harm is done.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Run With It
programme.desc: At an aquarium, thieves snatch a shark from an open tank and make a break for it, with employees hot on their heels. And then, two inmates make a clever escape by hiding in garbage cans. They're all on the run and the hunt is on to find them.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Switched at Birth, or Stolen?
programme.desc: '20/20' features a new interview with Kimberly Mays 30 years after she discovered she was switched at birth. We unravel the story, shedding new light on lingering questions about how the switch occurred.

programme.desc: '20/20' features a new interview with Kimberly Mays 30 years after she discovered she was switched at birth. We unravel the story, shedding new light on lingering questions about how the switch occurred.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Flames of Fury
programme.desc: A tight-knit community of West Virginia firefighters is horrified when they discover a suspicious fire is actually hiding a triple murder.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A wealthy power-couple's marriage is in shambles. When the husband reports killing his wife in self-defense, it's up to Detective McFadden to prove, against long odds and high-priced attorneys, that this influential citizen is a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: The Long Night
programme.desc: When Charlotte, NC Detective Garry McFadden agrees to do a favor for a witness in one of his cases, he finds himself involved in a strange murder investigation that plays out over one of the longest nights of his career, leading to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Serial Shooter
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis star is shot in the back after attending a charity ball, Detective McFadden must determine who could have had it in for such a seemingly faultless golden boy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Left to Die
programme.desc: Toddler Cooper Harris dies after being left in a hot car. His father says it was an accident. Authorities say it was murder. What secrets was the father keeping? The grieving mother who stunned a courtroom speaks out about what happened to her baby boy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Memory and Mystery
programme.desc: Twelve years after a brutal attack that left her almost dead, a woman undergoes hypnosis to recover memories of the man who assailed her. New DNA technology uses a single drop of blood to paint a portrait of a suspect. And police close in on an arrest.

programme.title: Shattered: Cowboy Killer
programme.desc: 2001. An 11-year-old girl makes a gruesome discovery in her own home.. a woman desperate to reach her mother has a sickening feeling something horrible has happened... and a homicide detective is assigned a murder case that will rattle her to her core.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Shattered: End of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1986, Geri Muck searches desperately for her missing daughter, but she has no idea that she's too late. The prosecutor wants justice, the brother wants revenge, but Geri just wants her daughter back.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres
programme.desc: In the 1890s, the Frontier had vanished, but in Bill Doolin, its spirit burned on. He terrorized Oklahoma with his brazen robberies and fought the greatest shootout in Western history.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Heroes of the Sky

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound

programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.desc: Mickey's Rainbow Color Machine runs out of color, which starts to cause a problem.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: Everyone sets out to find the End of the Rainbow.

programme.title: Chuggington: The Mighty Koko / Piperactive
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Goofy Race! / Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!
programme.desc: Goofy designs the first ever Goofy Race! When Cuckoo Loca's cuckoo clock is broken, Minnie and Daisy decide to get her a new one.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Seeing Stars/ A Tiny Triumph
programme.desc: Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny’s artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Roommate/ Minnie's Bow-tel!
programme.desc: When Pete needs a place to crash, Mickey offers to let him stay at his place. Unfortunately, Pete is the worst roommate ever! The Happy Helpers redecorate Mr. Doozy's hotel.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mikku and Chikku: Doll Detectives/ The Case of the Moving Day Meddler
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku decide to open their own detective agency, but when their first investigation goes awry, Mira must step in and lend a hand. Mira sets out on the case to find the culprit who keeps messing up the plans for Dhruv's family to move away.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pigs and Pugs/ Bob Loves Mona
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Engine Nine, Feelin' Fine/ The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Doc and her toys learn a lesson about dehydration after discovering that Donny's toy fire engine has run out of water. Stuffy rips his tail and tries to hide it from Doc and the toys learn that anyone can get hurt - even brave dragons.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer's Big Kerfloofle/ Frog Scouts
programme.desc: When Bunsen and Beaker bring a Floofle to the playroom, it bonds with Summer. Kermit, Robin and Carlos are so excited for their very first Frog Scouts outing, led by Mr. Manny.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: an unpredictable, outrageous and hilarious talking pony. No matter the complications he causes, Annie knows that everything is better when Pony is around.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls

programme.title: The King of Queens: Bed Spread
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover a new independence in their lives when they sleep in twin beds.

programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.desc: When Deacon meets another woman, Doug can't decide whether to tell him about his ex-wife.

programme.desc: Doug must pretend to be a lawyer when Carrie's law firm asks him to join their ball team.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Eggsit Strategy
programme.desc: Carrie hears that her law firm is laying off people and worries about her own job.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Santa Claustrophobia
programme.desc: Doug finds it difficult working with Carrie when she takes a temporary job at his company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Disappearing
programme.desc: A mother kills herself, leaving behind no sign of her son. Also, an ex-boyfriend allegedly kills four members of his ex-girlfriend's family.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder
programme.desc: A man is found dead on his living room floor, three decades later his case remains open. A detective is determined to pin the crime on the man's roommate.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Torture House
programme.desc: Two brothers share a grotesque hobby of kidnapping and torturing prostitutes, until one of their victims escapes and leads police to their house of horrors.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
